biological_replicate: we performed real-time quantitative reverse transcription PCR (qRT-PCR) and Western blotting in 5 ER+ and 6 ER– BC cell lines along with 2 breast epithelial cell lines...

experimental_design: we conducted a CRISPR/Cas9-based pooled knockout screen.
factor_value: we identified estrogen receptor α–positive (ER+) BC dependency on the cryptic ORFs.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.

number_of_biological_replicates: 5 ER+ and 6 ER– BC cell lines
